Full paper from Stanford / UCLA / USC ⬇️

The study looked at Web data across tens of thousands of households from 2021 - 2024. 

I suspect the productivity gains would be even more meaningful with more recent data 👀

https://t.co/V4f6DWsFwV https://t.co/8ed2S3SFyz

tweets.name: Venture Twins
tweets.text:
We talk a lot about AI improving enterprise productivity. But what about at home? 

A new study found households that adopted ChatGPT saw a ~2x efficiency boost for "productive online tasks" (education, job search, research).

And they spent significantly more time on leisure! https://t.co/KZuLs79wMt
